name: Pasta with Cherry Tomato Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook pasta in a large pot of boiling water for 8 to 10 minutes. Drain and rinse with cold water. Set aside.
2. While pasta is cooking, heat 2 teaspoons balsamic vinegar and 2 tablespoons water in a large skillet over medium heat. Saute onions and garlic, stirring frequently. Add tomato paste dissolved in 1 cup water. Stir gently and add tomatoes. Cook, stirring occasionally until vegetables are very soft.
3. Dissolve cornstarch in 2 tablespoons cold water and pour into a blender. Add miso and cooked vegetables. Puree until smooth. Return puree to skillet. Add 3 tablespoons balsamic vinegar and parsley. Heat through.
4. Toss pasta with sauce and serve hot.
